theme_clusters: Legal route selection is the first risk control for termination decisions.
Evidence quality and consistency across legal-HR-payroll narratives drives dispute outcomes.
Payroll timing and final settlement controls are operational risk multipliers.
Cross-border governance gaps (handoff, approvals, local interpretation) are a common failure layer.
dedup_notes: Removed repetitive timeline-heavy framing from previous run; replaced with risk matrix and scenario deck.
Merged overlapping practitioner explanations into one operational interpretation layer.
uncertainties: City-level arbitration and court practice can differ in evidentiary expectations and remedy outcomes.
Company policy language translated from global templates may conflict with local enforceability in edge cases.
